# Sprint Plan — Sprint ABC123

**Sprint ID**: ABC123
**Date**: 2026-03-31
**Duration**: 3 hours
**Goal**: Deliver core dashboard features for release

## Overview

This sprint focuses on delivering the core dashboard functionality with real-time metrics and user preferences. All deliverables target v2026.090.1.

## Tasks

1. PAP-1234 — Dashboard Redesign
2. PAP-1245 — Real-Time Metrics Integration
3. PAP-1256 — User Preferences and Settings

## Success Criteria

- All three tasks completed and QA-evaluated
- Production deployment successful
- Zero critical bugs in smoke tests

## Risk Assessment

No identified blockers. Estimated 3-hour sprint with 15-minute deployment buffer.
